title: 50pcs Luminous Resin Animals, 17 Styles Mini Resin Animals Mixed, Squirrel Bear Dinosaur Dogs Heimu Bees Lobster Miniature Rabbit Glow in The Dark, Mini Landscape for Garden Dollhouse Decoration
features: 【What You Will Get】:You will receive 50 pieces of miniature mini resin animalsin different styles, including resin hamster/Squirrel/The bear/Dinosaur/kitty/Heimu/Bees/sea dog/Sea turtle/carp/Crab/lobster , Ample quantity and rich colors are enough to meet your various creative and decorative needs

【Luminous Design】:These mini resin animals mixed have a unique luminous effect, they can absorb sunlight or light, the stronger the UV rays are, the brighter they glow in the dark, the resin animals glow during the daytime and nighttime, giving you a different experience and adding fun to your life

【Reliable Material】:These glow in the dark resin animals are made of high quality resin, sturdy, waterproof, lightweight and easy to place. The size of each mini resin animals is about 1.6x1.4cm / 0.63x0.55 inch, These mini resin animals are not easy to fade or break, can keep the bright colors for a long time, so you can have fun hiding and searching for mini animals and plants with your family and friends

【Wide Applications】:Mini resin animals bulk are suitable for a variety of scenarios, the mini animals can be used as doll house DIY decorations, miniature fairy tale garden landscape decorations, fish tanks and aquarium decorations, and you can also put these cute miniature things anywhere on your plants, gardens, rooms, backpacks, fridges, cupboards, or tables to easily create cute and vivid miniature landscapes, bringing your life endless fun

【Funny Gift】:The small resin animals figurines with cute and vivid design are suitable for DIY enthusiasts, animal lovers, gardeners or anyone who loves the mini world. Of course mini resin ducklings and other animal figurines are also ideal for gift giving on many occasions such as holidays, birthdays or parties
description: Product description 50pcs Luminous Resin Animals, 17 Styles mini resin animals mixed,Squirrel,bear,Dinosaur,Dogs,Heimu,Bees,lobster,Miniature Resin Rabbit Glow in the Dark, Mini Landscape for Garden Dollhouse Decoration Product Size: The size of each mini resin animals is about 1.6x1.4cm / 0.63x0.55 inch, suitable size for your use. Small and cute, easy to carry and store. Premium Material: Our mini animals ornaments are made of resin material, the surface is smooth and burr-free, waterproof, Not easy to fade and damage, and can be used for a long time. Special Design: These mini resin luminous animals can glow in the dark by themselves. You just need to put these miniature resin rabbit under the sun or light it up for the day, after absorbing enough light, you can see them glow at night. Wide Application: These luminous ornaments can be used to decorate outdoor gardens, lawns, landscapes or toy houses. It can be given as a gift to classmates, students and others who like DIY decorations. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources
